title: RepoContext envelope
description: Top-level shape of .codegenie/context/repo-context.yaml. Strict at root (`additionalProperties: false`); loose under `probes.*` so new probes extend the schema by addition (ADR-0013). Per-probe sub-schemas compose via `$ref` and MAY be strict at their slice (Phase 0's `language_detection` sub-schema is strict and sets that precedent).

schema_version.description: Semver of this envelope schema; bumps trigger surgical cache invalidation per ADR-0003.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the gather run started.

root.description: Absolute path to the analyzed repository root.

git_commit.description: Git HEAD commit SHA, or null if the repo is not under git.

probes.description: Per-probe output slices. Loose at this layer (additionalProperties: true) so adding a new probe never requires editing this envelope. Sub-schemas referenced below constrain known slices.
